top_signals.title: Russian warship accused of firing at yacht in English Channel
top_signals.summary: Ministry of Defence says it is ‘investigating reports of incident’
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Brightline Bondholders Grant Two-Week Extension on Debt Payment
top_signals.summary: Brightline Trains Florida LLC, the struggling $6 billion private railroad between Miami and Orlando, struck a deal with holders of $985 million of municipal bonds to extend a debt payment due Monday through the end of the month, according to a securities filing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan wants to send 30,000 young scientists abroad for AI, quantum research
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. EV Adoption Slows While Global Demand Accelerates
top_signals.summary: Electric vehicle sales in the United States are set to account for only 17% of all nationwide passenger vehicle sales in 2030, BloombergNEF said in its latest EV outlook, slashing its 27%-share projection from last year as the Trump Administration ended incentives for electric vehicles. Back in 2024, the year before President Trump won a second term in office, BloombergNEF expected EVs to have a 48% share of total U.S. passenger car sales in 2030. With the scrapping of the incentives for electric vehicle purchases, analysts, including those at…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: India's Kaynes enters Japan's chip assembly market with local partners
MANTRA to be acquired by Inveniam, backer that invested $20 million last year
top_signals.summary: The deal comes after MANTRA’s token suffered a major collapse in 2025 and then the company announced a restructure and layoffs.
